sch_get_symbols.notes: kicad-sch-api exposes component collections, but the current text surface needs a compatibility wrapper.

sch_get_wires.notes: No dedicated public wire-list API was verified in kicad-sch-api 0.5.6, so legacy parsing remains the temporary source.

sch_get_labels.notes: kicad-sch-api 0.5.6 can add labels but does not expose a verified public label-list method.

sch_get_net_names.notes: Net-name summaries can be rebuilt from pin connectivity helpers, but require a compatibility wrapper.

sch_add_symbol.notes: Component placement maps directly to ComponentCollection.add().

sch_add_wire.notes: Straight wire creation exists directly in the verified public API.

sch_add_label.notes: Local label creation exists directly in the verified public API.

sch_add_power_symbol.notes: Power symbols can be added as components, but hidden reference/value formatting needs a wrapper.

sch_add_bus.notes: No verified public bus creation API was found in kicad-sch-api 0.5.6.

sch_add_bus_wire_entry.notes: No verified public bus-entry API was found in kicad-sch-api 0.5.6.

sch_add_no_connect.notes: No verified public no-connect creation API was found in kicad-sch-api 0.5.6.

sch_update_properties.notes: Property updates are supported through component objects, but the current tool contract needs a wrapper.

sch_build_circuit.notes: Circuit construction can be rebuilt on top of verified primitives, but auto-layout and formatting require a wrapper.

sch_get_pin_positions.notes: Pin positions are available through component and symbol helpers, but the current library-oriented contract needs a wrapper.

sch_check_power_flags.notes: Power-flag analysis can be derived from ERC/validation output, but there is no direct one-shot helper.

sch_annotate.notes: No verified public annotation helper was found in kicad-sch-api 0.5.6.

verified_surface: KiCad IPC reload helper outside kicad-sch-api
sch_reload.notes: Reload is a KiCad IPC concern and will remain a wrapper around the active editor/session.
